completeness.notes: Hand-drafted minimal spec covering the read-only market endpoints plus order/position/wallet endpoints actually used by the curated app. HMAC signing is hand-written in ext/src/bybit/auth.rs; the spec only declares the resulting headers (X-BAPI-API-KEY, X-BAPI-TIMESTAMP, X-BAPI-RECV-WINDOW, X-BAPI-SIGN) so progenitor surfaces them as parameters. Response schemas use additionalProperties: true on objects with many optional fields (positions, orders, wallets) since Bybit returns category-conditional fields.
